name: Larry's Tropical Treats
recipeInstructions:
A taste of the tropics in every bite!
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. In a large bowl, cream butter until smooth.
3. Gradually add brown and white sugars, beating until creamy.
4. Beat in egg and vanilla extract.
5. Sift together flour, salt, and baking soda; stir into the mixture.
6. Gently fold in candied fruits, nuts, and white chocolate pieces.
7. Scoop batter by teaspoonfuls onto a greased cookie sheet, spacing well apart.
8. Bake for 8-10 minutes or until lightly golden brown.
9. Transfer to wire racks to cool.
Note: If you don't have all of the candied fruits, use what you have available; it will still be delicious.
Yield: 2 1/2 - 3 dozen.
